---
name: Theme Submission
about: Submit a new WebGL2 overlay theme
title: 'theme: [name]'
labels: theme
assignees: ''
---

**Theme name**

**Description**
What does it look like? What inspired it?

**Preview**
Attach a screenshot or GIF of the theme in action.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Implements `setAudioLevel(float)`, `setActive(bool)`, `setProcessing(bool)`, `setError(bool)`, `setCelebration()`
- [ ] Transparent background (no solid colors behind the effect)
- [ ] Renders on screen edges (not center)
- [ ] Tested with `swift build && bash install.sh`
